scripts.build:all: npm run build:shared && npm run build -ws
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/bot" "npm run dev -w apps/miniapp"
scripts.start: npm run build:all && npm start -w apps/api
scripts.start:api: npm run build:shared && npm start -w apps/api
scripts.db:push: npm run build:shared && npx prisma db push
